purpose: Curated high-signal X/Twitter accounts for macro, investing, energy, commodities, AI, semiconductors, and data-center research.

accounts.name: Lyn Alden
accounts.why_follow: Liquidity, debt cycles, fiscal dominance, energy, and long-cycle macro regime analysis.

accounts.why_follow: Fed plumbing, reserves, Treasury issuance, and QT/QE mechanics.

accounts.why_follow: Macro regime shifts, inflation, policy, and central-bank framing.

accounts.why_follow: Rates, inflation, bond-market signals, and cross-asset macro.

accounts.name: Liz Ann Sonders
accounts.why_follow: Equity strategy, breadth, sector rotation, and sentiment.

accounts.why_follow: Fed, labor, credit, and recession-risk analysis.

accounts.why_follow: Labor-market data and recession diagnostics.

accounts.why_follow: FX, tactical macro trading, and positioning.

accounts.name: Dario Perkins
accounts.why_follow: Global macro and policy second-order effects.

accounts.why_follow: Chart-heavy macro dashboard and market internals.
